title: Record doc/test coverage before/after for 3 or more tools
context: The project's success metrics include 'tools with measurably improved doc/test coverage' — but this is only verifiable if before/after measurements are recorded consistently. This task collects and commits the coverage deltas for at least three tools across contributions contrib-011, contrib-012, and contrib-016, using the named ecosystem tooling (interrogate/pydocstyle for Python, roxygen/tools::undoc for R, line/branch coverage from CI). Without this, M2's Definition of Done ('measurable doc/test coverage improvement recorded for at least 3 tools') cannot be met.
objective: Collect and commit doc-completeness and test-coverage deltas for at least three tools, using the named ecosystem tooling per tool, and store the before/after pairs in each contribution's gate/provenance artifact and in a summary document.
acceptanceCriteria: Doc-completeness and/or test-coverage before/after pairs are recorded for at least three tools from contributions contrib-011, contrib-012, and contrib-016.
Each measurement uses the appropriate ecosystem tooling: interrogate or pydocstyle for Python; roxygen2 or tools::undoc for R; line/branch coverage from the project's own CI coverage tooling.
Before/after pairs are stored in each contribution's gate/provenance artifact and in a consolidated summary document.
The summary document is committed and verifiable against the M2 success metric ('measurably improved doc/test coverage for at least 3 tools').
Technical reviewer sign-off obtained confirming the measurements are from the tool's own CI coverage tooling and reflect real changes.
resources: Outcome artifacts from contrib-011, contrib-012, contrib-016
interrogate documentation; pydocstyle; coverage.py; covr (R); roxygen2
output: A committed summary document recording doc-completeness and test-coverage before/after deltas for at least three tools, fulfilling the M2 Definition of Done coverage measurement requirement.
